name: ptywright
description: Terminal/TUI automation driver over PTY + xterm, exposed as MCP tools
author: Kingsword kingsword09 <kingsword09@gmail.com>

scripts.codex:help-test: mkdir -p .tmp && bun run src/codex/extract_mcp_tool_text.ts --prompt prompts/codex_help_test.prompt --tool snapshot_view --out .tmp/codex_help_test.last.txt --jsonl .tmp/codex_help_test.jsonl --stderr .tmp/codex_help_test.stderr.log && cat .tmp/codex_help_test.last.txt
scripts.codex:ansi-color-demo: mkdir -p .tmp && bun run src/codex/extract_mcp_tool_text.ts --prompt prompts/ansi_color_demo.prompt --tool snapshot_view_ansi --out .tmp/ansi_color_demo.last.txt --jsonl .tmp/codex_ansi_color_demo.jsonl --stderr .tmp/codex_ansi_color_demo.stderr.log && cat .tmp/ansi_color_demo.last.txt
scripts.codex:trace-demo: mkdir -p .tmp && bun run src/codex/extract_mcp_tool_text.ts --prompt prompts/trace_demo_cast.prompt --tool snapshot_cast --out .tmp/trace_demo.cast --jsonl .tmp/codex_trace_demo.jsonl --stderr .tmp/codex_trace_demo.stderr.log && tail -n 30 .tmp/trace_demo.cast
scripts.codex:trace-demo:txt: mkdir -p .tmp && bun run codex:trace-demo > /dev/null && asciinema convert -f txt .tmp/trace_demo.cast -
scripts.codex:trace-demo:report: bun run codex:trace-demo && bun run trace:report-demo
scripts.codex:trace-demo:marked: mkdir -p .tmp && bun run src/codex/extract_mcp_tool_text.ts --prompt prompts/trace_demo_cast_marked.prompt --tool snapshot_cast --out .tmp/trace_demo_marked.cast --jsonl .tmp/codex_trace_demo_marked.jsonl --stderr .tmp/codex_trace_demo_marked.stderr.log && tail -n 30 .tmp/trace_demo_marked.cast
scripts.codex:trace-demo:report:marked: bun run codex:trace-demo:marked && bun run trace:report-demo:marked
scripts.codex:mouse-click-demo: mkdir -p .tmp && bun run src/codex/extract_mcp_tool_text.ts --prompt prompts/mouse_click_demo.prompt --tool snapshot_view --out .tmp/mouse_click_demo.last.txt --jsonl .tmp/codex_mouse_click_demo.jsonl --stderr .tmp/codex_mouse_click_demo.stderr.log && cat .tmp/mouse_click_demo.last.txt
scripts.codex:ansi-color-demo:cast: mkdir -p .tmp && bun run src/codex/extract_mcp_tool_text.ts --prompt prompts/ansi_color_demo_cast.prompt --tool snapshot_cast --out .tmp/ansi_color_demo.cast --jsonl .tmp/codex_ansi_color_demo_cast.jsonl --stderr .tmp/codex_ansi_color_demo_cast.stderr.log && tail -n 30 .tmp/ansi_color_demo.cast
scripts.codex:ansi-color-demo:report: bun run codex:ansi-color-demo:cast && bun run trace:report-demo:ansi-color
scripts.codex:m5-mask-demo: mkdir -p .tmp && bun run src/codex/extract_mcp_tool_text.ts --prompt prompts/m5_mask_demo.prompt --tool snapshot_view --out .tmp/m5_mask_demo.last.txt --jsonl .tmp/codex_m5_mask_demo.jsonl --stderr .tmp/codex_m5_mask_demo.stderr.log && cat .tmp/m5_mask_demo.last.txt
